title: Mongo as parser sink, Postgres as canonical retrieval store
summary: Refactor the Mongo→Postgres data flow so (a) multiple parsers can populate Mongo (pluggable; e.g. swap pymupdf4llm for a llamahub PDF reader) and (b) the Mongo→PG sync is a thin, idempotent ETL. PG becomes the canonical store for everything downstream of parsing.
